title: Adis Zemen Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Adis Zemen with a Z-Score of +3.37. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Adis Zemen has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is exceptionally high, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.8 GG, indicating a significant increase in energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is 18% and the wind speed is 5.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
